caption: A person holds a graded trading card encased in a clear plastic slab against a neutral background. In the initial frame, the slab is tilted, reflecting light and obscuring the card. As the sequence progresses, the person adjusts the angle, revealing a purple and green card featuring a player in a football helmet. The background contains several stacks of black boxes and a white object resembling a helmet. The lower portion of the screen features a large orange and white logo that reads "PYST" and "EBREAKS" in white text. A smaller inset video in the bottom right shows a man wearing a black shirt and a baseball cap, while a small logo for "CASPYS.com" is visible near the center. By the final frames, the card is held steady, clearly displaying its colors and the graded holder.
